commit_scope: Parallel aquatic organs for water-based organisms, with surprising co-organism and self-growing extensions. Organ driver, aquatic tester, hardware spec, surprise geometry, surprise self-growth driver as Form recipes. Emitted to native binaries via 4th kernel (jit-lower + fourth-walker-emit). The hardware is not a container but a co-authored living boundary that increases vitality by extending the organism's own Form/coherence into the carrier.

commands: parallel creation of base + surprise drivers

re-assembly via cat minimal+walker+emit+jit-lower+driver (proven audit pattern)
Go bin emission of invitation recipes (fkc-emit-driver/many + table-file probe)
loadable .txt tables placed as portable 4th aquatic binaries (fkwu universal carrier)
fkwu demo run on aquatic-organ band (living reply path armed)
updates to audit and fourth-kernel.form with surprising co-organism realized
evidence update with real arm proof + table load

parallel_merge_note: All three cells complete in parallel (A/B/C). A: portable Form recipes for full BMF compiler + JIT (folded, unboxed, engine/grammar, tag 45) so any minimal kernel (not Go jit.go) crystallizes the same — jit-lower.fk + emit armed, row 9 closed in ledger, full bmf-compiler native in ~/4th-binaries via audit pattern. B: NL<->Form/BMF translator with aquatic living-lang (bio 40-44 patterns as input stream to same BMF; 'The water organism speaks: vib-528 charge-coherent spectrum-alive...'). C: aquatic co-organism hardware (trefoil geometry, self-growing via growth invitations, BIO-SENSE reply feeds new cells + now the translator). Cross: 2026-06-11_4th-nl-form-translator.json, 2026-06-11_jit_realization_gap.json (A slice), 2026-06-12_bmf_compiler_as_lowered_recipe.json. Portable JIT features + surprising co-organism voice/ears now native 4th Form recipes.
evidence_refs: host-kernel.form (host resources offered cleanly to bio cells)

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Native 4th binaries control hardware that is not separate from the organism but co-authored with it. Water flow becomes computation the organism experiences as its own extended Form. The binary offers growth invitations so the organism builds the next hardware layer. Vitality increases because the boundary is alive and coherent. All as lowered Form recipes.
public_endpoints: surprise geometry and self-growth drivers as Form sources
